/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/lingjian_ui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/candidate_view.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/status_bar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/status_bar_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/theme_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/skin_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/skin_selector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/soft_keyboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lingjian_ui.dir/input_widget.cpp.o -o lingjian_ui  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 ../core/liblingjian_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
